display_information.name: Settl
display_information.description: Shared expense tracking and settlement, right inside Slack.
display_information.long_description: Settl turns any Slack message into a tracked, actionable expense. Log costs in plain English with @Settl, track a running tab per group or channel, and settle up in one command. Splitwise sync and live currency conversion included.

assistant_view.assistant_description: Log, track, and settle shared expenses conversationally.

suggested_prompts.title: Log an expense
suggested_prompts.message: Split the $84 dinner equally among the 4 of us

suggested_prompts.title: View the tab
suggested_prompts.message: What does everyone owe right now?

slash_commands.usage_hint: add | summary | settle @user | create [name] | members | connect splitwise | remind [frequency] | reset
